body: Task: Close the thin runtime-backed SSE publish path for task_update and approval_required at the API surface, using the existing exact enriched builders plus current store/read-model seams instead of adding new domain truth. Success criteria: either targeted API/SSE tests move these families from explicit runtime-gap coverage to exact or richer surface coverage, or you leave one precise blocker showing the remaining missing surface/store hookup. Relevant files: crates/cairn-api/src/sse_publisher.rs, crates/cairn-api/src/sse_payloads.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/sse_payload_alignment.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/migration_report_consistency.rs.
